raw.subject: Your Clovis page caught my eye, Buddy B’s bbq and catering
raw.body:
Hi,

Something I noticed about your Facebook page is that you're always sharing beautiful pictures of your food, and I can tell that the community in Clovis really loves your BBQ. It's clear that you're passionate about what you do, and your enthusiasm shines through in every post.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean that you're missing out on some potential bookings and calls from customers who are looking for a local favorite like yours.

I sketched up a quick homepage idea based on the photos and posts you share on Facebook. It includes a menu hero section that showcases your signature dishes, hours block that lets customers know when they can come visit, and a photo gallery that lets them see what you're all about.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/buddy-b-s-bbq-and-catering-clovis

I'd love to chat with you about taking this idea and turning it into a fully functional website that reflects your brand and helps you reach more customers. For local businesses like yours, it's usually a straightforward project with a flat fee. I'd be happy to discuss details over the phone or via email if you're interested.
